title: Subtract within 20 visually
description: Subtract within 20 using ten frames, place value blocks, number lines, and groups of objects.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Subtract.**  
*Hint: Use the place value blocks to help solve $13 - 4$.*

 [[☃ numeric-input 1]] ${}\Large=\blueE{13} - \maroonD4$

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/552734b86e1832b3364cf20780222bb7ffcb6fe2)
hints: Let's use the place value blocks to help us solve.

The first set of blocks has $\blueE{13}$ place value blocks. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/69581e01528113251253bd43185f1a3db8a18876)

The second set of blocks has $\maroonD{4}$ place value blocks.

There are $\blueE9$ blocks left.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/301bb28cd36c577d484fbcc439dcdb0c1f6868d5)
${}\Large\blueE9=\blueE{13} - \maroonD4$
